text.message: nah have to block black here
hes about to obliterate all of us
you know what you just did right
im going to ruin oranges game since he ruined mine
sorry blue...but once i lost 2910 idk what you expect me to do
im going to kill your game
you have to know that catan is social
you shouldnt be making enemies and expecting to win
when you play stupid games you get to win stupid prizes
shouldnt have given a nb to black in first place
like you thought that was actually smart
bleu had a 3 numbers set up
like i said your game is done buddy
dont u prefer to leave instead of ruining everyone game?
it wasnt even a ruthless plow...i literally had nothing else to do
you dont do that in catan
expect go for the sheep port?
you wanted one extra ore & to ruin my game
that should be part of your decision making when figuring out what you want to do on a board
pissing someone off generally doesnt translate to wins
you gave a nb to the dude in 1st, blocked me, & then plowed me. like wtf did you expect to happen??
he wouldnt be in a terrible position still if he actually tried
it was over the second orange gave black the nb
i have reasonable reason to block orange the last 2 times
now I block black. hes ahead.
this game was over due to you both trading black
do you not see how OP the setup is from the very first settlement he had??
so dont even think about blaming me for hitting orange 2 times for plwing me
that'd be even more clown moves from you both
